message:
feat(stdio): add vis + nvis (NetBSD single-byte vis) (bd-7om4b)

NetBSD vis(3) single-byte encoders. Companion to the
strvis/strnvis/strunvis/strnunvis quartet (bd-i18zl).

* stdio_abi::vis(dst, c, flags, nextc) encodes one byte into dst
  (NUL-terminated) and returns a pointer to the trailing NUL.
  Reuses core::stdio::vis::encode_byte so default-mode
  (\^X / \M-X) and VIS_OCTAL (\NNN) match the strvis output
  byte-for-byte.
* stdio_abi::nvis(dst, dlen, c, flags, nextc) is the bounded
  variant — returns NULL on overflow without writing.
* nextc is documented as a disambiguation hint for octal
  output; with our 3-digit-padded \NNN it has no effect, but we
  accept it for ABI parity.

10 abi integration tests covering: printable byte passthrough,
control char as \^X, high-bit byte as \M-X, VIS_OCTAL forces
\NNN, return-pointer points at the trailing NUL, NULL dst
guard, nvis exact-fit + overflow + zero-dlen + NULL guards.
Clippy-clean, fmt-clean. All builds via rch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
